leadText: The Syrupy Apple (Japanese: みついりりんご Honeycore Apple) is a type of item introduced in Generation IX.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Causes Applin to evolve into Dipplin upon use. This consumes the Syrupy Apple.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Syrupy Apples are required to evolve certain Pokémon in Pokémon GO. They are consumed upon use. Applin requires 200 and 20 Syrupy Apples to evolve into Dipplin .

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description S V A peculiar apple that can make a certain species of Pokémon evolve. It's exceptionally syrupy.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description GO A peculiar apple that can make a certain species of Pokémon evolve. It's exceptionally syrupy.
